name: ambient-tinystyler
description: Local TinyStyler few-shot text style transfer through reusable style profiles.

modelAssets.name: tinystyler-transfer-weights
modelAssets.license: MIT model card. PyTorch pickle weights must be loaded only from this reviewed, declared cache path.

modelAssets.name: t5-v1_1-large-backbone
modelAssets.license: Apache-2.0 upstream model terms; needed by TinyStyler inference before applying TinyStyler weights.

modelAssets.name: t5-v1_1-large-config
modelAssets.license: Apache-2.0 upstream model config for local TinyStyler transfer.

modelAssets.name: t5-v1_1-large-spiece-model
modelAssets.license: Apache-2.0 upstream tokenizer model for local TinyStyler transfer.

modelAssets.name: t5-v1_1-large-tokenizer-config
modelAssets.license: Apache-2.0 upstream tokenizer config for local TinyStyler transfer.

modelAssets.name: t5-v1_1-large-special-tokens-map
modelAssets.license: Apache-2.0 upstream tokenizer special-token map for local TinyStyler transfer.

modelAssets.name: style-embedding-model-weights
modelAssets.license: Hugging Face model asset used to compute style embeddings from user-provided examples.

modelAssets.name: style-embedding-config
modelAssets.license: Hugging Face model config for local Style-Embedding profile extraction.

modelAssets.name: style-embedding-tokenizer
modelAssets.license: Hugging Face tokenizer asset for local Style-Embedding profile extraction.

modelAssets.name: style-embedding-tokenizer-config
modelAssets.license: Hugging Face tokenizer config for local Style-Embedding profile extraction.

modelAssets.name: style-embedding-special-tokens-map
modelAssets.license: Hugging Face tokenizer special-token map for local Style-Embedding profile extraction.

tinystyler_doctor.description: Report TinyStyler package contract, host/runtime facts, declared model assets, and real-runtime implementation status without downloads.

tinystyler_profile.description: Create a reusable TinyStyler style profile JSON from example texts using local Style-Embedding assets when dependencies are installed; deterministic fake and fixture modes support validation.

tinystyler_transfer.description: Rewrite source text using a TinyStyler style profile or example texts through local TinyStyler assets when dependencies are installed; deterministic fake and fixture modes support validation.
